case_title: THE CARD FACTORY VS BANK OF AMERICA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,211.41 FILED BY THE CARD FACTORY AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
